---
title: "bobtail_interactions_pilot"
author: "DEKERLE_Louis"
date: "2026-04-30"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r LIBRARIES}

library(igraph)

```

```{r DATA}

# First session 
adj_matrix = as.matrix(read.csv("interaction_matrix.csv", sep =";", header = FALSE))

# remove unidentified individuals 
adj_matrix_ID = adj_matrix[-9,-9]

# Second session
adj_matrix2 = as.matrix(read.csv("interaction_matrix2.csv", sep =";", header = FALSE))

adj_matrix_all = adj_matrix_ID + adj_matrix2
```


```{r graph of interactions}

g <- make_empty_graph()

#create the graph
g <- graph_from_adjacency_matrix(
    adj_matrix_all,
    mode = c("undirected"),
    weighted = TRUE,
    diag = F,
    add.colnames = NULL,
    add.rownames = FALSE
)

# dispose the vertex in cicrle 
layout <-layout_in_circle(g)

# plot 
plot(g, layout = layout, main = "Working title", edge.width = E(g)$weight*0.6)# E(g) containes the attributes of the edges. We multiply the weight by 3 to increase the contrast between the width of the lines

```
```{r Structural properties without non ID}

#binary degrees 
degree(g)

# densities 
edge_density(g, loops = FALSE) # existing edges / possible edges

#weighted degrees 
strength(
  g,
  vids = V(g), #The vertices for which the strength will be calculated
  loops = TRUE, #Logical; whether the loop edges are also counted. (here none)
  weights = NULL # use the default weight edge attribute in the matrix 
)

```
